payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with large dark glass door and horizontal handle, right-side electronic control panel with buttons and knob, interior light on and reflective metal finish; fully visible and appears mounted in place (approx. 1.2 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"stainless-steel microwave with glass","long_description":"Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with large dark glass door and horizontal handle, right-side electronic control panel with buttons and knob, interior light on and reflective metal finish; fully visible and appears mounted in place (approx. 1.2 m from camera).","attributes":["stainless-steel finish","dark glass window","horizontal bar handle","right-side control panel","buttons and knob","interior light on","reflective surface","full frontal view","mounted/over-the-range style"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
